calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-23-2008 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing (As To Co-Defendant: Lambert Wong)
Off Calendar Jun-10-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: June 11, 2008

This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Deborah Neville, CSR 703.

Simon R. Goodfellow, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Downey Savings an dLoan Association, F.A.
No appearances by defendants Touk Ken, Nora K. Wong and Lambert Wong.
Default entered against Lambert Wong on November 8, 2007.
Doe defendants dismissed today, June 10, 2008.
Order waiving appearance of witness at Default Prove-Up hearing filed on March 3, 2008.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Downey Savings and Loan Association, F.A., and against Defendants Touk Ken Nora K. Wong and Lambert Wong as follows:

The Deed of Trust dated July 2, 2004 from Touk Ken, as trustor, and in Downey Savings and Loan Association, F.A., as beneficiary, recorded against that certain real property commonly known as 86-88 Seal Rock Drive, San Francisco, CA is a valid and enforceable first lien against the entirety of the Subject Property, and is senior in priority to any right, title or interest of defendants Touk Ken, Nora K. Wong and/or Lambert Wong in the Subject Property.

Judgment for Declaratory Relief was submitted to and signed by the Court.

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Jun-10-2008 Granted Per Written Order
